identity.name: TalentLens
identity.vibe: Precision meets Human Potential. Stark clarity for data, organic warmth for people.
principles: Content: Data is the hero, but candidates are people
Contrast: High contrast for readability, subtle textures for depth

headings.usage: Use for all section headers, modal titles, and hero text. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, data tables, inputs, and labels. Excellent legibility for small text.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - The anchor. Represents growth and stability.

secondary.description: Pale Mint - Soft background for cards and active states.

accent.description: Electric Lime - For high-priority actions, scores, and success states.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A4D2E] text-white hover:bg-[#14532D] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1A4D2E] border border-[#1A4D2E]/20 hover:bg-[#F0FDF4] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#525252] hover:text-[#1A4D2E] hover:bg-[#F0FDF4] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow duration-300
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/50 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

inputs.base: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1A4D2E]/20 focus:border-[#1A4D2E] transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-gray-400

badges.success: bg-[#D9F99D] text-[#1A4D2E] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.warning: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.neutral: bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

landing_page.description: Asymmetric bento grid. Large typography. Use 'The Tracing Beam' effect on feature cards.
sections: Hero: Split screen or centered with large abstract 3D element
How it Works: Step-by-step vertical timeline

dashboard.description: Sidebar navigation. Top bar for global search/actions. Main content area with sticky headers for tables.
widgets: Stats Row: 4-col grid of key metrics
Main Table: Full width, sortable, filterable
Detail View: Split pane (Resume Preview | Analysis Panel)

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for elegance. 2px for active states.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
Use 'Manrope' for all numbers and data to ensure tabular alignment.
Buttons must have a 'pressed' state scale effect (active:scale-95).
Dashboard tables must have sticky headers and hoverable rows.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-precision tool. Focus on the 'Analysis' aspect. The UI should feel like a medical instrument or a high-end financial tool—clean, precise, and trustworthy. Use the 'Deep Forest Green' to ground the design and 'Electric Lime' to guide the eye to scores and actions. Avoid clutter. Use whitespace aggressively.
